name: GetGitHubToken
friendlyName: Get GitHub Token from Service Connection
description: Retrieves a short-lived GitHub token from an Azure DevOps GitHub service connection and stores it as a secret variable
helpMarkDown: This task gets a GitHub token from the specified service connection and makes it available as a secret pipeline variable
author: 4tecture

inputs.name: gitHubConnection
inputs.label: GitHub connection (OAuth or PAT)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Select the GitHub service connection to use for authentication

inputs.name: variableName
inputs.label: Output Variable Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: The name of the pipeline variable to store the token in. The variable will be set as a secret variable.
